title: hariota micrantha
intro: Hariota micrantha, also known as the lesser hariota, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. Hariota micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or poultice, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
